title: Discussion with Mid-market Support Leader
input_text:
Interviewer: What's the biggest headache in your team right now?
User: Honestly, it's just the sheer volume of repetitive stuff. We get the same password reset and billing questions hundreds of times a day. We have macros, but agents still have to manually verify the user identity every single time which takes 30-40 seconds per ticket. It adds up. Also, because our current AI tool is a 'black box', I can't explain to my boss why it suggested a refund for a high-value account. I need more control and visibility.
